name: atlas-blob-compute-smoke-tiled
description: E5 Phase 7d Step 4 — compute marcher with tile-the-dispatch (tileCount=2 = 2x2 = 4 tiles per frame). Verifies that tiled dispatch produces identical output to non-tiled and that each tile's GPU time is roughly 1/4 of the baseline (well under TDR ceiling). Uses the same atlas-blob scene as the non-tiled smoke for direct visual comparison.
